prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-KPL-TBALLSET-5PC Product Type: TOYS_AND_GAMES Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio 5pc Sports Toy Baseball Tee Ball Playset with Bat and Balls, Boys 3 and Up Description: Is your child a budding athlete? This 5pc baseball sports play set from Kidplokio has everything your child needs to practice their baseball skills - a plastic bat, 2 balls, a home base, and a batting tee! This set is a great option for kids learning to play baseball.

All of the accessories included in this playset are made of durable, high-quality plastic that will withstand inclement weather so your child can play outside, rain or shine, without worrying about the toys being ruined. Outdoor sports toy sets are great options for getting children outside to exercise, and they can encourage team spirit, and help improve fine motor skills.

The tee ball game set accessories are safe for children ages 3 and up with adult supervision, and they are easy to clean: just wipe with soapy water and let air dry in between uses. This baseball set is a great gift idea, and will encourage your child to have some fun outside away from screens! Search Terms: kids baseball toy play set outdoor batting cage for toddlers fun with dad skill development for children Features: - 5PC TEE BALL PLAYSET - The Kidplokio Tee Ball Playset comes with everything your child needs to practice their baseball skills - a plastic bat, (2) balls, a home base, and a batting tee; Great practice set for kids learning to play baseball - DURABLE BASEBALL ACCESSORIES - All baseball accessories included are made of durable, high-quality plastic that will stand the test of time; Plastic outdoor toys are great for use in any weather so your child can play rain or shine without worrying about ruining their toys - ENCOURAGES EXERCISE - Outdoor sports toy sets are great toy options to get children outside to exercise; Playing sports outside encourages exercise, gets kids off of screens, and can help improve fine motor skills during playtime - SAFE FOR KIDS - All baseball toy set accessories are safe for children ages 3 and up with adult supervision; Plastic toys can be easily cleaned by wiping them down with soapy water and letting air dry in between uses - SPECIFICATIONS - Pieces included: 5 (bat, 2x balls, tee, and home base); Bat length: 26.5”; Material: plastic; Colors: blue, black, red, white; Age recommendation: 3+ years; Choking hazard (small parts); Assembly required: no === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Kidplokio 5-Pc Tee Ball Baseball Playset with Bat

tokens.name: Tee Ball Baseball Playset with Bat

anthropic.title_differentiation: Includes Bat, 2 Balls, Tee And Home Base, Durable Plastic, Ages 3 And Up, Outdoor Sports Practice Set

openai.title_differentiation: 5 Piece Set, Plastic Bat And Balls, Home Plate And Tee, Ages 3 Plus, Outdoor Play, Skill Building
